praise: App.tsx monolith reduced from 780 to 190 lines — excellent separation of concerns
10 reusable UI primitives with consistent API (Button, Card, Input, Modal, Toast, Skeleton, EmptyState, Avatar, Toggle, Tabs)
Toast notification system with provider/hook pattern — replaces window.alert()
Modal component with built-in focus trapping — major accessibility win
10 new animation keyframes for premium micro-interactions
Staggered list animations on day expand (50ms delay per item)
Mobile-first components: FAB, Bottom Nav, Swipe hook
Skip-to-content link and role=main landmark added
Keyboard shortcuts system with discoverable ? overlay
Zero TypeScript errors across all 26 new files
suggestions: Replace remaining window.alert() calls in TaskEditModal.tsx with useToast
Apply the new UI primitives (Button, Input, Card) to existing components (TaskEditModal, TeamPanel)
Add dark/light theme toggle using CSS custom properties
Add more ARIA live regions for dynamic content updates (sync status changes)
Integrate MobileBottomNav and FloatingActionButton into the main App layout
Add visual regression testing with Playwright screenshots
